text:
Emissary of Darkness is the 47th episode of Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood.

Episode Notes

This episode is adapted from content in Chapter 68: Portrait of a Family, Chapter 85: The Empty Box and Chapter 86: Servant of Darkness.
The array that appears in the background of this episode's title card is Alphonse Elric's blood rune.
In this episode, Lan Fan returns with her Automail.
